hero.title: Join Us
hero.subtitle: Be part of the team
hero.heading: We are hiring graduate students, postdoc candidates, and undergrads
intro: We are building a team of motivated engineers and scientists who are interested in pursuing fundamentally innovative ideas in biology in a multidisciplinary and collaborative research environment. Talented and self-driven individuals at all stages of their academic careers are welcome to get in touch.

Lab members will be expected to develop strong understanding of biochemistry/biophysics, ML/non-ML-based optimization, and good computing skills. Projects are likely to have student development opportunities with collaborating groups in other universities, national labs, and industry, and conference participation.

opportunities.title: Graduate students
opportunities.body: If you are already in a graduate program (PhD/MS) at {iastate}, feel free to {email} Prof. Chowdhury directly. If you are planning to apply for a PhD program at Iowa State, we recommend the {cbe} / {microbiology} / {cs} PhD tracks.

opportunities.title: Postdoctoral fellows
opportunities.body: Candidates with experience in either structural protein biology and biochemistry, or molecular simulations are encouraged to apply. Please {email} your CV, research interests, references, and career plans after the postdoc.

opportunities.title: Undergraduate students
opportunities.body: Motivated individuals familiar with programming with ML frameworks and interest in biological data are highly encouraged to apply. Please {email} us with your short CV, research interests, and coding experience.
